description: Test: MerlinStore/CardSystem/SaveSystem initialized before first card draw in BroceliandeForest3D

invariants_checked.check: GameManager is registered as Godot autoload
invariants_checked.notes: GameManager listed first in [autoload] section. Runs before any scene.

invariants_checked.check: GameManager._ready() creates MerlinStore and adds to /root/
invariants_checked.notes: PASS: MerlinStore created and added via call_deferred. WARN: call_deferred means MerlinStore is added at END of current frame, not immediately. In normal gameplay, frames elapse between autoload init and scene transitions, so MerlinStore is available in time.

invariants_checked.check: MerlinCardSystem and MerlinSaveSystem co-initialized with MerlinStore
invariants_checked.notes: var save_system := MerlinSaveSystem.new() (line 35), var cards := MerlinCardSystem.new() (line 42). Both instantiated as part of MerlinStore. Available the instant MerlinStore is created.
Checks has_node('/root/MerlinStore') first, then searches root children for MerlinStore class. Defensive fallback.

invariants_checked.check: walk_event_controller guards _check_run_end() when store is null
invariants_checked.notes: if not _store: return — prevents crash if MerlinStore was not found at setup time.

invariants_checked.check: First card draw only possible after player interaction (not frame 0)
invariants_checked.notes: Cards are generated after the player walks a distance trigger, not on _ready(). Multiple frames elapse. By then, call_deferred has completed and MerlinStore is available.

summary: In normal gameplay flow, MerlinStore/CardSystem/SaveSystem are all available before any card draw. The call_deferred race condition only affects frame-0 direct scene loads (debug only). Guards in walk_event_controller prevent crashes. WARN: BroceliandeForest3D at lines 894+1063 uses /root/GameManager.get('run_state') for HUD updates — this is the WRONG node (should be /root/MerlinStore.state['run']). HUD life display and card score→life effects are currently non-functional.
